title: Improve error message in module instantiation when wire array given to output array with wrong lengths

features.name: module instantiation mismatched unpacked array port dimensions
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an output port with unpacked array dimensions is connected to a wire with different unpacked array dimensions
features.snippet:
module inner(output [31:0] arr [7:0]); endmodule
module outer; wire [31:0] arr [15:0]; inner i(.arr(arr)); endmodule
